sourcePrompt: An RPD light machine gun, an NVA belt-fed squad automatic, just over a meter long. A wood-stocked machine gun with a long plain barrel, a folding bipod at the muzzle, a wooden buttstock, pistol grip and fore-grip, and its signature round sheet-metal drum hanging centered beneath the receiver carrying the belt. Wood furniture and blued steel, low-slung and steady.
handEdit: drum rotated 90deg: flat faces now front/back (belt coil plane perpendicular to barrel); offline rebake
